nodes.name: Visualize Multi-Layer Architecture Models
nodes.description: Provide interactive, navigable visualization of 12-layer architecture models using React Flow graph rendering

nodes.name: Enable Real-Time Collaboration
nodes.description: Support concurrent architecture review via real-time WebSocket model sync and collaborative annotations

nodes.name: Accelerate Architecture Documentation
nodes.description: Reduce friction in creating and reviewing architecture documentation by integrating directly with DR CLI model files

nodes.name: Ensure Accessible Architecture Views
nodes.description: Meet WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards so all team members can use the viewer regardless of assistive technology needs

nodes.name: Development Team
nodes.description: Internal engineering team that builds and maintains the documentation_robotics_viewer

nodes.name: Architecture Team
nodes.description: Architects who create DR models and use the viewer to communicate architecture decisions

nodes.name: DR CLI Server
nodes.description: System dependency: DR CLI server that must be running to serve model data to the viewer

nodes.name: WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance
nodes.description: All interactive components must pass axe-core automated accessibility testing and meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA criteria

nodes.name: DR CLI Server Integration
nodes.description: Viewer must connect to DR CLI REST API and WebSocket JSON-RPC endpoint to load and sync model data

nodes.name: Multi-Layout Engine Support
nodes.description: Graph rendering must support at least 4 layout algorithms (Dagre, ELK, D3-Force, Graphviz) selectable at runtime

nodes.name: Embedded Deployment Mode
nodes.description: Viewer must support deployment as an embedded iframe within the DR CLI local web interface using hash-based routing

nodes.name: Browser-Only Deployment
nodes.description: Viewer is a pure browser SPA with no server-side rendering; all data fetched from external DR CLI server

nodes.name: DR CLI Server Dependency
nodes.description: Viewer has no standalone mode; requires a running DR CLI server at localhost:8080 to load model data

nodes.name: TypeScript Strict Mode
nodes.description: All source files must be strongly typed TypeScript; no any types in production code

nodes.name: Read First, Always
nodes.description: Never modify code without reading it first; always understand existing patterns before introducing changes

nodes.name: Core-App Architectural Separation
nodes.description: Strict boundary: Core layer has no route/store dependencies; only App components may use embedded stores and route context

nodes.name: Zustand-Only State Management
nodes.description: All global state managed via Zustand stores; no Redux, no React Context for state — Context used only for providers

nodes.name: Configuration-Driven Node Rendering
nodes.description: All graph nodes rendered by single UnifiedNode component driven by nodeConfig.json; adding node types requires only config changes, not code changes

nodes.name: Architecture Documentation Complexity
nodes.description: 12-layer architecture model spanning motivation through testing is too complex to communicate via static diagrams; interactive tooling needed

nodes.name: Team Distributed Review Needs
nodes.description: Architecture review must support asynchronous collaboration; annotations and real-time sync reduce review cycle time

nodes.name: Architecture Model Visualization
nodes.description: Interactive multi-layer graph visualization of architecture models loaded from DR CLI YAML

nodes.name: Changeset Review
nodes.description: Visual diff review of proposed architecture changes via DR CLI changesets

nodes.name: Schema Exploration
nodes.description: Browse and inspect layer specification schemas to understand the architecture meta-model

nodes.name: AI-Assisted Architecture Chat
nodes.description: Conversational interface to query and explore the architecture model via DR CLI AI assistant

nodes.name: Model Annotation
nodes.description: Collaborative annotation of architecture model elements with comments and markup

nodes.name: Architecture Reviewer
nodes.description: Team member who uses the viewer to review, annotate, and discuss architecture models and changesets

nodes.name: Model Author
nodes.description: Architect who creates and updates the DR model via DR CLI; views results in the viewer

nodes.name: Model Loading and Rendering
nodes.description: Process of loading YAML model data from DR CLI REST API, transforming to React Flow nodes, and rendering interactive graph

nodes.name: Real-time Model Synchronization
nodes.description: Continuous synchronization of model state via WebSocket JSON-RPC connection to DR CLI server

nodes.name: Changeset Review Flow
nodes.description: Process of fetching proposed changesets, visualizing diffs, and presenting them for review

nodes.name: Authentication Flow
nodes.description: Magic-link token receipt, storage, and injection into all subsequent API requests

nodes.name: Graph Layout Computation
nodes.description: Automated positioning of architecture elements using configurable layout engines (Dagre, ELK, D3-Force, Graphviz)

nodes.name: Cross-Layer Reference Resolution
nodes.description: Extraction and resolution of cross-layer references between model elements across all 12 architecture layers

nodes.name: YAML Model Parsing
nodes.description: Parsing and validation of DR CLI YAML model files into typed TypeScript model objects

nodes.name: Architecture Model
nodes.description: The multi-layer YAML architecture model managed by DR CLI and visualized by the viewer

nodes.name: Changeset
nodes.description: A proposed set of architecture model changes that can be reviewed, staged, and committed

nodes.name: Annotation
nodes.description: User-created comment or markup attached to a specific model element for collaborative review

nodes.name: Authenticated Viewer
nodes.description: Role granted to users who possess a valid bearer token; can read model data and write annotations

nodes.name: Bearer Token Authentication
nodes.description: Magic-link bearer token auth: token arrives via ?token= URL param, stored in localStorage under dr_auth_token, injected as Authorization: Bearer on all REST requests. Provider modeled as local (custom magic-link implementation).

nodes.name: DR CLI Server
nodes.description: External DR CLI server that issues authentication tokens and serves model data

nodes.name: Developer
nodes.description: Human user who authenticates via magic link to view and annotate architecture models

nodes.name: Architecture Model Data
nodes.description: Internal architecture documentation data; confidential within organization

nodes.name: Read Model Data
nodes.description: Permission to read architecture model layers, elements, and relationships

nodes.name: Write Annotations
nodes.description: Permission to create and update annotations on model elements

nodes.name: Unauthenticated Model Access
nodes.description: Risk that an unauthenticated user accesses model data if bearer token is absent or invalid

nodes.name: Documentation Robotics Viewer Security Model
nodes.description: Security model for the documentation_robotics_viewer browser application

nodes.name: Model REST API
nodes.description: DR CLI REST API endpoints (/api/v1/model, /api/v1/elements, etc.) protected by bearer token

nodes.name: WebSocket JSON-RPC Channel
nodes.description: WebSocket connection to DR CLI server protected by ?token= query parameter (custom headers not supported in WebSocket)

nodes.name: Bearer Token Policy
nodes.description: All REST requests inject Authorization: Bearer header via global fetch interceptor; WebSocket uses ?token= query param; token persisted in localStorage

nodes.name: Model Route
nodes.description: TanStack Router route that renders the main architecture model graph visualization with layer selection and cross-layer navigation

nodes.name: Changeset Route
nodes.description: TanStack Router route displaying changeset history, diff views, and changeset graph visualization

nodes.name: Spec Route
nodes.description: TanStack Router route rendering the JSON Schema spec browser with layer schema navigation

nodes.name: Auth Route
nodes.description: TanStack Router route handling token-based authentication via magic link; extracts token from URL query params

nodes.name: DR CLI REST Interface
nodes.description: The HTTP REST interface through which the embedded app communicates with the DR CLI visualization server

nodes.name: DR CLI WebSocket Interface
nodes.description: The WebSocket interface for subscribing to real-time model/changeset/annotation update events

nodes.name: Graph Viewer
nodes.description: The primary React Flow canvas component; renders all architecture nodes and edges with pan/zoom, minimap, and SpaceMouse support

nodes.name: Dagre Layout Engine
nodes.description: Adapts the Dagre hierarchical layout algorithm to the React Flow node/edge format; implements the LayoutEngine interface

nodes.name: ELK Layout Engine
nodes.description: Adapts the Eclipse Layout Kernel (ELK) to React Flow; supports layered, force, stress, and tree algorithms

nodes.name: Layout Engine Registry
nodes.description: Central registry that resolves layout algorithm by name and orchestrates layout computation across engines

nodes.name: Data Loader
nodes.description: Orchestrates model and spec data loading from the DR CLI REST API; coordinates YAML parsing, schema parsing, and cross-layer reference extraction

nodes.name: Node Transformer
nodes.description: Transforms raw YAML model elements into React Flow node data (UnifiedNodeData) with position, styling, and handle assignments

nodes.name: YAML Parser
nodes.description: Parses YAML model files into typed JavaScript objects; used by DataLoader for all layer files

nodes.name: JSON Schema Parser
nodes.description: Parses JSON Schema spec files from the DR CLI; used to power the Spec viewer and field-level type information

nodes.name: Cross-Layer Reference Extractor
nodes.description: Extracts cross-layer reference declarations from YAML element attributes across all layers

nodes.name: Cross-Layer Processor
nodes.description: Resolves and validates cross-layer references; builds the edge list connecting nodes across different architecture layers

nodes.name: Cross-Layer Links Extractor
nodes.description: Extracts implicit link relationships between layers from element attribute patterns

nodes.name: Spec Parser
nodes.description: Parses the DR CLI spec manifest and layer spec schemas into structured TypeScript objects

nodes.name: Generated API Client
nodes.description: Auto-generated TypeScript HTTP client from the OpenAPI spec; provides typed methods for all DR CLI REST endpoints

nodes.name: Impact Analysis Service
nodes.description: Analyzes change impact by traversing cross-layer relationships to identify transitively affected elements

nodes.name: Export Utils
nodes.description: Handles PNG/SVG export of graph views and ZIP archive bundling of model data

nodes.name: Local File Loader
nodes.description: Loads model YAML files from local filesystem during development (fallback when DR CLI server not available)

nodes.name: Libavoid Router
nodes.description: Computes obstacle-avoiding edge routes using the libavoid-js WASM library for complex graph layouts

nodes.name: Worker Pool
nodes.description: Manages a pool of Web Workers for parallelizing CPU-intensive layout and data-processing tasks

nodes.name: GitHub Service
nodes.description: Fetches model YAML files directly from GitHub repository URLs as an alternative data source

nodes.name: Exception Classifier
nodes.description: Classifies runtime exceptions into categories for structured error reporting and Storybook story error filtering

nodes.name: Chat Service
nodes.description: Interfaces with the Claude AI API to provide architectural assistant chat functionality; manages message streaming and tool invocations

nodes.name: WebSocket Client
nodes.description: Manages the persistent WebSocket connection to the DR CLI server; handles reconnection, topic subscriptions, and JSON-RPC message dispatch

nodes.name: JSON-RPC Handler
nodes.description: Processes incoming JSON-RPC 2.0 messages from the WebSocket connection; routes model/changeset/annotation update events to the appropriate stores

nodes.name: Changeset Graph Builder
nodes.description: Transforms changeset diff data into React Flow graph nodes and edges for visual changeset review

nodes.name: Embedded Data Loader
nodes.description: Coordinates data loading for the embedded app; selects between DR CLI server, GitHub, or local file sources based on connection state

nodes.name: Coverage Analyzer
nodes.description: Analyzes model completeness by comparing element counts and relationship coverage against expected patterns

nodes.name: Error Tracker
nodes.description: Captures and categorizes runtime errors with context for display in the UI and structured logging

nodes.name: Chat Validation
nodes.description: Validates chat message content and enforces conversation constraints before submission

nodes.name: Relationships YAML Parser
nodes.description: Parses the flat relationships.yaml file (v0.8.3 format) containing cross-layer relationship entries; resolves dot-notation source/target IDs to UUIDs using a lookup map and maps predicates to RelationshipType values

nodes.name: Predicate Type Mapper
nodes.description: Single source of truth for mapping predicate strings to RelationshipType string values; normalizes predicates by converting underscores to hyphens and handles all ArchiMate-style, motivation, security, and general relationship predicates

nodes.name: Spec Schema Loader
nodes.description: Stateless service that loads and indexes spec schemas from layer JSON files; parses node schemas and relationship schemas per layer and returns a Record keyed by layer ID

nodes.name: Spec Schema File Loader
nodes.description: Fetches .dr/spec/*.json files (manifest.json, base.json, and per-layer schemas) in parallel via HTTP; used by SpecRoute and ModelRoute to load spec schema data for the spec viewer and predicate catalog

nodes.name: Predicate Catalog Loader
nodes.description: Stateless service that parses the predicate catalog from base.json; builds indexed PredicateCatalog maps for forward predicate lookup by name and inverse predicate lookup by inverse name, enabling catalog-driven field discovery in the CrossLayerReferenceExtractor

nodes.name: Context Sub-Graph Builder
nodes.description: Builds 1-hop neighborhood sub-graphs for a given focal node using radial layout; powers the node focus/context view in the embedded application

nodes.name: Spec Context Sub-Graph Builder
nodes.description: Builds 1-hop neighborhood sub-graphs for spec node types using relationship schemas; powers the spec browser context view

nodes.name: Model Store
nodes.description: Global Zustand store holding the parsed architecture model, loading state, and error state

nodes.name: Layer Store
nodes.description: Zustand store managing active layer selection and layer visibility filters

nodes.name: Element Store
nodes.description: Zustand store tracking selected element, highlighted paths, and focus mode state

nodes.name: Cross-Layer Store
nodes.description: Zustand store holding resolved cross-layer references and edge data for the graph

nodes.name: Field Visibility Store
nodes.description: Zustand store managing graph-level and node-level field visibility toggles

nodes.name: Layout Preferences Store
nodes.description: Zustand store persisting user layout algorithm preferences and layout configuration options

nodes.name: Auth Store
nodes.description: Zustand store managing the DR CLI auth token, authentication state, and magic-link token extraction

nodes.name: Connection Store
nodes.description: Zustand store tracking WebSocket connection state (connected/disconnected/reconnecting) to the DR CLI server

nodes.name: Changeset Store
nodes.description: Zustand store managing the active changeset list, selected changeset, and changeset diff state

nodes.name: Annotation Store
nodes.description: Zustand store managing user annotations on model elements; syncs with DR CLI server via REST API

nodes.name: Chat Store
nodes.description: Zustand store managing chat conversation history, streaming state, and active tool invocations for the AI assistant

nodes.name: View Preference Store
nodes.description: Zustand store persisting view mode preferences (graph vs. details, sidebar visibility, zoom level)

nodes.name: Floating Chat Store
nodes.description: Zustand store managing the floating chat panel open/close state and panel position

nodes.name: Vite Build Pipeline
nodes.description: Automated build sequence: copy WASM assets → generate OpenAPI client → check API version → Vite bundle → package embedded artifact; produces the deployable app

nodes.name: Playwright Test Execution
nodes.description: Automated test pipeline running 1170 Playwright tests across unit, integration, and E2E configs (playwright.config.ts, playwright.e2e.config.ts, playwright.auth.config.ts)

nodes.name: OpenAPI Type Generation
nodes.description: Code-generation process using openapi-typescript to produce src/core/types/api-client.ts from the OpenAPI spec; enforces client-server type contract at build time

nodes.name: App to DR CLI HTTPS Path
nodes.description: HTTPS communication path from browser application to the DR CLI REST server; carries JSON model management requests and responses

nodes.name: App to DR CLI WebSocket Path
nodes.description: Persistent WebSocket path between browser application and DR CLI server; carries JSON-RPC 2.0 real-time model update messages

nodes.name: DR CLI REST Server
nodes.description: HTTP compute service exposing the DR model management REST API; the embedded app connects to this service to read/write architecture model elements

nodes.name: WebSocket Model Service
nodes.description: Persistent WebSocket messaging service on the DR CLI server; delivers real-time model change events to connected browser clients via JSON-RPC 2.0

nodes.name: Docker Agent Container
nodes.description: Container runtime node for the Claude Code agent process; defined by Dockerfile.agent, provides isolated execution environment for DR CLI beta test runs

nodes.name: Vite Dev Server
nodes.description: Development HTTP server node running on port 3001; spawned by Vite with HMR, hosts the embedded app during local development and E2E testing

nodes.name: Embedded App Bundle
nodes.description: Production Vite build output; bundled React application (JS/CSS) packaged as an embeddable archive via package-embedded.cjs script

nodes.name: Docker Agent Image
nodes.description: Docker container image for the Claude Code agent runtime, defined in Dockerfile.agent; used for isolated DR CLI beta testing

nodes.name: OpenAPI Specification
nodes.description: OpenAPI 3.0 REST API contract (docs/api-spec.yaml) describing the DR CLI server endpoints; source for TypeScript client generation

nodes.name: Storybook Catalog Build
nodes.description: Static Storybook build output (dist/storybook/); pre-built component catalog for CI validation and a11y testing

nodes.name: Node.js
nodes.description: JavaScript runtime environment powering the build toolchain, dev server, and test execution pipeline

nodes.name: Vite 6
nodes.description: Next-generation build toolchain and HMR dev server for the React application; handles TypeScript compilation, bundling, and WASM file copying

nodes.name: TypeScript 5.9
nodes.description: Statically-typed JavaScript superset providing compile-time type safety across all source files, strict mode enabled

nodes.name: React 19
nodes.description: Core UI rendering framework; component-based architecture with concurrent rendering, used via Vite plugin for JSX transformation

nodes.name: React Flow
nodes.description: @xyflow/react 12.10 — interactive graph visualization library powering the multi-layer architecture diagrams with custom node and edge types

nodes.name: Dagre
nodes.description: Hierarchical directed-graph layout engine; primary layout algorithm for structured architecture diagrams with ranked node positioning

nodes.name: ELK.js
nodes.description: Eclipse Layout Kernel JavaScript port (elkjs 0.11); advanced graph layout supporting layered, force, stress, and tree algorithms for complex diagrams

nodes.name: D3 Force
nodes.description: d3-force 3.0 — physics-based force simulation for organic graph layouts; used for non-hierarchical relationship visualizations

nodes.name: Graphviz WASM
nodes.description: @hpcc-js/wasm 2.30 — Graphviz compiled to WebAssembly; enables server-side-grade Graphviz layout algorithms (dot, neato, fdp) in the browser

nodes.name: Zustand 5
nodes.description: Lightweight Zustand state management library; provides multiple isolated stores (modelStore, layerStore, elementStore, crossLayerStore, etc.) with no Redux/Context coupling

nodes.name: TanStack Router
nodes.description: @tanstack/react-router 1.139 — fully type-safe file-based client-side router; powers the embedded app route hierarchy

nodes.name: Tailwind CSS v4
nodes.description: Utility-first CSS framework v4 with PostCSS pipeline; all styling via utility classes, dark mode variants required on all components

nodes.name: Flowbite React
nodes.description: Tailwind-based React component library (flowbite-react 0.12, flowbite 4.0); provides Card, Badge, Button, Modal and other UI primitives

nodes.name: Playwright
nodes.description: @playwright/test 1.57 — end-to-end browser automation framework; runs 1170 unit/integration tests and E2E suite with axe-core accessibility validation

nodes.name: Storybook 10
nodes.description: Component development and testing catalog (storybook 10.2); hosts 578 stories across 97 files with CSF3 format; includes a11y addon and test runner

nodes.name: Express.js 5
nodes.description: Node.js HTTP server framework (express 5.1); used for the DR CLI integration server and authentication test server

nodes.name: REST HTTPS Interface
nodes.description: HTTPS interface point exposing DR CLI REST API endpoints to the browser application; typed against the generated OpenAPI client

nodes.name: WebSocket Interface
nodes.description: WebSocket interface providing full-duplex communication channel for real-time JSON-RPC 2.0 model update notifications

nodes.name: Health Path
nodes.description: Path /health — no authentication required

attributes.description: Server health check; no auth required

nodes.name: Spec Path
nodes.description: Path /api/spec — returns all JSON Schema specification files

attributes.description: Retrieve all DR spec JSON Schema files

nodes.name: Model Path
nodes.description: Path /api/model — returns the full architecture model

nodes.name: Changesets Path
nodes.description: Path /api/changesets — lists all available changesets

nodes.name: Changeset Detail Path
nodes.description: Path /api/changesets/{changesetId} — retrieves a specific changeset by ID

nodes.name: Annotations Path
nodes.description: Path /api/annotations — list and create annotations

nodes.name: Annotation Detail Path
nodes.description: Path /api/annotations/{annotationId} — update and delete a specific annotation

attributes.description: Update or delete annotation by ID

nodes.name: WebSocket Path
nodes.description: Path /ws — WebSocket upgrade endpoint for real-time event subscriptions

attributes.description: WebSocket upgrade for real-time model/changeset/annotation events

nodes.name: DR CLI Visualization Server API
nodes.description: OpenAPI document info for the Documentation Robotics Visualization Server API

nodes.name: Health Check
nodes.description: No auth required; returns server status and version

nodes.name: Get Schema Specifications
nodes.description: Returns all JSON Schema files from .dr/schemas/ including layer schemas, relationship catalog, and link registry

attributes.summary: Get all JSON Schema specification files

nodes.name: Get Architecture Model
nodes.description: Returns full architecture model from documentation-robotics/model/ including all layers, elements, relationships, and cross-layer references

nodes.name: List Changesets
nodes.description: Returns registry of all available changesets with summaries

nodes.name: Get Changeset Details
nodes.description: Returns detailed changeset including all element changes with before/after states

nodes.name: Get Annotations
nodes.description: Returns annotations optionally filtered by elementId query param

attributes.summary: Get annotations with optional elementId filter

nodes.name: Create Annotation
nodes.description: Creates a new annotation on a model element

nodes.name: Update Annotation
nodes.description: Updates content or tags of an existing annotation

nodes.name: Delete Annotation
nodes.description: Deletes an existing annotation

nodes.name: WebSocket Real-time Updates
nodes.description: Persistent WebSocket connection for subscribing to model/changeset/annotation real-time events via JSON message protocol

nodes.name: Bearer Auth Scheme
nodes.description: Token in Authorization header; used for REST API endpoints requiring authentication

nodes.name: Query Auth Scheme
nodes.description: Token as ?token= query param; used for WebSocket connection authentication where Authorization headers cannot be set

nodes.name: DR CLI Visualization Server OpenAPI Document
nodes.description: Root OpenAPI 3.0 document describing the Documentation Robotics Visualization Server REST and WebSocket API

nodes.name: ElementId
nodes.description: Branded string type for architecture element IDs (dot-notation format: layer.type.name); prevents accidental mixing with AnnotationId or ChangesetId at compile time.

nodes.name: AnnotationId
nodes.description: Branded string type for annotation IDs; cannot be assigned from ElementId or ChangesetId at compile time.

nodes.name: ChangesetId
nodes.description: Branded string type for changeset IDs; cannot be assigned from ElementId or AnnotationId at compile time.

nodes.name: MetaModel
nodes.description: Root container for the loaded architecture model; holds all layers, cross-layer references, and metadata. Loaded from DR CLI REST API response and stored in modelStore.

nodes.name: Layer
nodes.description: Individual architecture layer within the MetaModel; contains a flat list of elements, intra-layer relationships, and visual configuration.

nodes.name: ModelElement
nodes.description: Base element interface for all architecture layer elements; holds the element ID (dot-notation), type, name, properties, visual positioning, and intra-layer relationship references.

nodes.name: Relationship
nodes.description: Typed relationship between two elements within the same layer; supports 15 ArchiMate and custom relationship types (composition, aggregation, realization, serving, access, data-flow, etc.).

nodes.name: Reference
nodes.description: Cross-layer reference connecting an element in one architecture layer to an element in another; carries source/target layer IDs, element IDs, and validation status.

nodes.name: ModelMetadata
nodes.description: Metadata bag attached to the MetaModel root; includes author, timestamps, parse errors, element/layer counts, and cross-layer reference statistics.

nodes.name: ExtractedReference
nodes.description: Raw reference metadata captured during YAML parsing before cross-layer resolution; stores property name, reference type, and target identifier or UUID.

nodes.name: YAMLManifest
nodes.description: TypeScript representation of the on-disk manifest.yaml file; tracks model version, project info, per-layer file paths and schema references, and aggregate statistics.

nodes.name: YAMLElement
nodes.description: Structure of a single model element as stored in a YAML file; includes id, name, description, optional API properties (method, path), inline relationships, and arbitrary custom properties.

nodes.name: YAMLLayerData
nodes.description: Aggregated layer data assembled from multiple YAML files for a single layer; maps element names to YAMLElement objects with source file tracking.

nodes.name: YAMLModelData
nodes.description: Complete parsed model result from YAML loading; combines the manifest, all layer data, optional projection rules, and accumulated parser warnings.

nodes.name: YAMLRelationships
nodes.description: Nested relationship declarations within a YAML element; groups cross-layer references by semantic type (realizes, serves, accesses, uses, secured_by, supports_goals, etc.).

nodes.name: ProjectionRule
nodes.description: Rule definition in projection-rules.yaml describing how to auto-generate elements in one layer from elements in another (e.g., business.service -> application.service).

nodes.name: ChatMessage
nodes.description: Multi-part chat conversation message; contains a role (user/assistant/system), ordered content parts (text, tool invocations, thinking, usage, errors), and streaming state.

nodes.name: ToolInvocationContent
nodes.description: Chat content part representing an AI tool invocation; tracks tool name, typed input parameters, and execution status (executing/completed/failed) with result or error.

nodes.name: JsonRpcRequest
nodes.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 request envelope used for all chat WebSocket messages; carries jsonrpc version string, method name, typed params, and request ID for correlation.

nodes.name: ChatConversation
nodes.description: Chat conversation grouping metadata; holds conversation ID, title, creation/update timestamps, and message count.

nodes.name: Annotation
nodes.description: User annotation attached to a specific architecture model element; includes author, markdown content, resolution state, and an optional thread of replies.

nodes.name: AnnotationCreate
nodes.description: Request payload for creating a new annotation; requires target elementId and content text.

nodes.name: WebSocketMessage
nodes.description: Base WebSocket protocol message with discriminating type string; all real-time server messages extend this interface.

nodes.name: WebSocketEventMap
nodes.description: Typed event map for all WebSocket client events: connect, disconnect, message, error, close, reconnecting, rest-mode, max-reconnect-attempts.

nodes.name: BaseNodeData
nodes.description: React Flow node data shared by all 20 custom node types; carries label, elementId, layerId, fill/stroke colors, optional modelElement reference, semantic zoom detail level, changeset operation, and relationship badge.

nodes.name: DataModelField
nodes.description: Field definition for data model table nodes displayed in the graph; holds field id, name, type string, required flag, and optional description.

nodes.name: DataModelNodeData
nodes.description: Specialized React Flow node data for data model elements; extends BaseNodeData with an ordered list of DataModelField entries and a componentType discriminator (entity/interface/enum).

nodes.name: SourceReference
nodes.description: Tracks where a model element was extracted from; holds provenance type (extracted/manual/inferred/generated), a list of SourceLocation entries (file + optional symbol), and optional repository context (URL + commit SHA)

nodes.name: RelationshipType
nodes.description: TypeScript enum providing dot-notation access to the full v0.8.3 predicate catalog; covers motivation, business, structural, process, data, API, testing, security, and UI/navigation predicates; kept for backwards compatibility alongside the RelationshipTypeValue union type

nodes.name: RelationshipsYamlEntry
nodes.description: Structure of a single entry in the flat relationships.yaml file (v0.8.3 format); requires source and target dot-notation paths and a predicate string, with optional layer, category, and arbitrary properties

nodes.name: PredicateDefinition
nodes.description: Full predicate metadata from the v0.8.3 predicate catalog; carries predicate name, inverse name, category, description, optional ArchiMate alignment, semantic properties (directionality/transitivity/symmetry/reflexivity), default strength, and fieldPaths for dynamic reference discovery

nodes.name: SpecLayerData
nodes.description: Structured spec data for a single architecture layer loaded from .dr/spec/*.json; contains layer metadata (id, number, name, description), a map of node type name to JSON schema, and an array of SpecNodeRelationship entries

nodes.name: SpecNodeRelationship
nodes.description: Valid relationship definition between two spec node types; specifies source and destination spec node IDs and their layers, predicate, cardinality, strength, and whether the relationship is required

nodes.name: PredicateCatalog
nodes.description: Indexed predicate catalog produced by PredicateCatalogLoader from base.json; provides two Maps: byPredicate (predicate name -> PredicateDefinition) and byInverse (inverse predicate name -> forward predicate name) for O(1) catalog lookups

nodes.name: DR Model YAML Store
nodes.description: File-based document store holding the architecture model as YAML files under documentation-robotics/model/; organized into per-layer subdirectories with a root manifest.yaml. Read by dataLoader via DR CLI REST API (GET /api/model).

nodes.name: Browser localStorage
nodes.description: Browser Web Storage API used for client-side persistence of auth tokens, layout preferences, view state, and floating chat position; survives page reloads but not browser profile deletion.

nodes.name: Model Manifest
nodes.description: Single manifest.yaml file at the model root; contains model version, project info, layer registry with file paths and element counts, cross-reference totals, and validation statistics.

nodes.name: Layer YAML Files
nodes.description: Per-layer YAML files (e.g., 05_technology/systemsoftware.yaml) containing element definitions keyed by element name; multiple files may contribute elements to a single layer.

nodes.name: Changeset Files
nodes.description: YAML files in documentation-robotics/changesets/; each file represents a named changeset with metadata, status (active/applied/abandoned), and list of element changes with before/after states.

nodes.name: Auth Token Entry
nodes.description: localStorage key storing the DR CLI bearer auth token extracted from the magic link URL; read on startup, cleared on logout or invalid token response.

nodes.name: Layout Preferences Entry
nodes.description: localStorage key persisting the user's selected layout algorithm and layout configuration options (spacing, direction, etc.) across sessions via Zustand persist middleware.

nodes.name: View Preferences Entry
nodes.description: localStorage key persisting view mode choices (graph vs. details, sidebar collapsed state, zoom level) via Zustand persist middleware.

nodes.name: Floating Chat State Entry
nodes.description: localStorage key persisting the floating chat panel's open/closed state and panel position across sessions.

nodes.name: Embedded Architecture Viewer
nodes.description: Single-page web application (hash-based SPA) for visualizing multi-layer architecture documentation models; embeds in an iframe and connects to the DR CLI visualization server.

nodes.name: Embedded Layout
nodes.description: Root application shell wrapping all routes; provides the top-level tab bar (Spec/Model/Changesets), sub-tab navigation, connection status indicator, and floating chat button.

nodes.name: Shared Layout
nodes.description: 3-column layout shell used by all route views; composes optional left sidebar, main content area, and optional right sidebar; handles collapsed states.

nodes.name: Graph View Sidebar
nodes.description: Right-side sidebar panel composing filter panel, control panel, inspector panel, and optional annotation panel in a fixed render order; collapsible.

nodes.name: Model Layers Sidebar
nodes.description: Left sidebar listing all architecture layers with visibility toggles, element counts, and active layer selection; drives layer filtering in the graph viewer.

nodes.name: Node Details Panel
nodes.description: Inspector panel showing full properties, attributes, relationships, and cross-layer references for the currently selected graph node.

nodes.name: Chat Panel
nodes.description: Docked AI assistant chat panel showing conversation history with multi-part messages (text, thinking blocks, tool invocations, usage stats); includes streaming input.

nodes.name: Floating Chat Panel
nodes.description: Overlay floating chat panel accessible from the chat button in the top bar; can be opened without leaving the current view; persists position to localStorage.

nodes.name: Annotation Panel
nodes.description: Panel for viewing and creating user annotations on selected model elements; shows threaded comment list with resolve/unresolve actions; syncs with DR CLI annotation API.

nodes.name: Cross-Layer Panel
nodes.description: Side panel visualizing cross-layer reference connections for a selected element; shows inbound and outbound references grouped by target layer with navigation links.

nodes.name: Changeset Viewer
nodes.description: Detail panel for a selected changeset; shows metadata (status, timestamps, change counts) and the list of individual element add/update/delete operations.

nodes.name: Model Visualization Spec
nodes.description: UX specification for the architecture model visualization area; covers graph and table detail views, layer filtering, cross-layer relationship exploration, and element selection interactions.

nodes.name: Schema Spec Browser Spec
nodes.description: UX specification for the DR CLI JSON Schema specification browser; allows users to inspect layer schemas, relationship catalogs, and link registry in graph and detail views.

nodes.name: Changeset Review Spec
nodes.description: UX specification for reviewing architecture model changesets; supports graph-based diff visualization and list view of all staged/applied/abandoned changesets.

nodes.name: Authentication Spec
nodes.description: UX specification for token-based authentication flow; extracts bearer token from magic link URL query parameter and redirects to the model view on success.

nodes.name: Auth View
nodes.description: Landing view at route /#/; extracts the DR CLI bearer token from the ?token= URL query parameter, persists it to localStorage, and redirects to the model view.

nodes.name: Model Graph View
nodes.description: Primary architecture model view at /#/model/graph; renders the interactive React Flow graph canvas with layer swimlanes, cross-layer edges, semantic zoom, and element focus mode.

nodes.name: Model Details View
nodes.description: Tabular model element detail view at /#/model/details; presents element properties, relationships, and cross-layer references in an accessible table format.

nodes.name: Spec Graph View
nodes.description: Schema specification graph view at /#/spec/graph; visualizes the JSON Schema definitions from the DR CLI spec as a navigable graph of schema nodes.

nodes.name: Spec Details View
nodes.description: Schema specification detail view at /#/spec/details; shows full JSON Schema property listings and type information in a structured panel.

nodes.name: Changeset Graph View
nodes.description: Changeset diff visualization view at /#/changesets/graph; renders added/updated/deleted model elements as a color-coded React Flow graph using changesetGraphBuilder.

nodes.name: Changeset List View
nodes.description: Changeset history list view at /#/changesets/list; shows all changesets with status badges, timestamps, and element change counts; allows selecting a changeset to inspect.

nodes.name: Graph Toolbar
nodes.description: Top toolbar overlay on the React Flow canvas; provides layout algorithm selector, zoom controls, export button group, minimap toggle, and field visibility toggle.

nodes.name: Connection Status Indicator
nodes.description: Badge component showing live DR CLI WebSocket connection state (connected/reconnecting/disconnected/rest-mode) in the top bar; links to the auth route on failure.

nodes.name: Cross-Layer Filter Panel
nodes.description: Filter control panel for selecting which cross-layer reference types to display as edges in the graph; grouped by relationship category with toggle switches.

nodes.name: Layout Preferences Panel
nodes.description: Control panel for selecting the active graph layout algorithm (Dagre/ELK/D3-Force/Graphviz) and configuring layout-specific parameters (direction, spacing, algorithm variant).

nodes.name: Model Details Viewer
nodes.description: Tabular display component listing all visible model elements with type, layer, and property columns; supports sorting and row selection for element inspection.

nodes.name: Spec Viewer
nodes.description: JSON Schema specification display component; renders schema type trees, property listings, required field indicators, and $ref resolution for the DR CLI spec schemas.

nodes.name: Changeset List
nodes.description: Scrollable list component showing all available changesets with status badges (active/applied/abandoned), change counts, and creation timestamps.

nodes.name: Mini Map
nodes.description: React Flow MiniMap component providing a zoomed-out overview of the full graph canvas with a viewport indicator rectangle for navigation awareness.

nodes.name: Graph Statistics Panel
nodes.description: Summary panel showing element counts by layer, relationship counts, cross-layer reference statistics, and model completeness indicators.

nodes.name: Export Button Group
nodes.description: Button group for exporting the current graph view as PNG or SVG, and downloading the full model as a ZIP archive.

nodes.name: Sub-Tab Navigation
nodes.description: Secondary tab bar shown within each main section (graph/details for model and spec; graph/list for changesets); triggers route changes to sub-view paths.

nodes.name: Empty State
nodes.description: Standardized empty content placeholder with icon, heading, and optional action button; used across model, spec, and changeset views when no data is available.

nodes.name: Error State
nodes.description: Standardized error display fragment with error message, icon, and retry action; used by ErrorBoundary components and failed data load states.

nodes.name: Loading State
nodes.description: Standardized loading spinner fragment with optional message; shown during data fetch, layout computation, and WebSocket reconnection.

nodes.name: Breadcrumb Navigation
nodes.description: Cross-layer navigation breadcrumb showing the path from the currently selected element back through its cross-layer reference chain; enables hierarchical model traversal.

nodes.name: Node Context Menu
nodes.description: Right-click context menu for graph nodes; offers actions: focus element, copy element ID, view details, and expand/collapse cross-layer references.

nodes.name: Highlighted Path Panel
nodes.description: Overlay panel showing the dependency path between two selected nodes; lists the intermediate nodes and relationship types along the shortest cross-layer path.

nodes.name: Authentication Flow Pattern
nodes.description: Multi-step UX state machine for the token-based authentication flow; states: unauthenticated → extracting-token → validating → authenticated; handles invalid token rejection.

nodes.name: Data Loading Pattern
nodes.description: Standard data-loading state pattern used across all views; states: idle → loading → loaded/error; with optional retry action on error state.

nodes.name: Authentication Guard
nodes.description: Auth guard that intercepts navigation to protected routes (model, spec, changesets); checks authStore for a valid bearer token; redirects to /#/ index route if token is absent.

nodes.name: Token Extraction Step
nodes.description: First step in the auth flow; renders on the index route, reads ?token= from URL, stores token, then triggers programmatic redirect.

nodes.name: Post-Auth Model Entry Step
nodes.description: Second step in the auth flow; the destination after successful token extraction; navigates to /model/graph with optional layer query param.

nodes.name: Index Route
nodes.description: Landing route at path /#/; accepts optional ?token= search parameter; renders AuthRoute component that extracts the magic link token and redirects to the model view.

nodes.name: Model Redirect Route
nodes.description: Redirect route at /#/model; immediately navigates to /#/model/graph as the default model view; provides a stable short URL for the model section.

nodes.name: Model View Route
nodes.description: Parameterized model view route at /#/model/:view (graph or details); accepts optional ?layer= search param for direct layer selection; protected — requires valid auth token.

nodes.name: Spec Redirect Route
nodes.description: Redirect route at /#/spec; immediately navigates to /#/spec/graph as the default spec view.

nodes.name: Spec View Route
nodes.description: Parameterized spec browser route at /#/spec/:view (graph or details); renders SpecRoute component with JSON Schema visualization; protected — requires valid auth token.

nodes.name: Changesets Redirect Route
nodes.description: Redirect route at /#/changesets; immediately navigates to /#/changesets/graph.

nodes.name: Changesets View Route
nodes.description: Parameterized changesets route at /#/changesets/:view (graph or list); renders ChangesetRoute component; protected — requires valid auth token.

nodes.name: Embedded App Navigation Graph
nodes.description: Root routing container for the hash-based SPA; uses TanStack Router with createHashHistory(); defines the complete route tree with parent-child relationships.

nodes.name: Cross-Layer Breadcrumb
nodes.description: Breadcrumb configuration for cross-layer element navigation; labels show element name + layer prefix (e.g., application / Graph Viewer); enables back-navigation through reference chains.

nodes.name: Tab Navigation Transition
nodes.description: User-triggered tab switch between main sections (Spec, Model, Changesets); fires when the user clicks a top-level tab in EmbeddedLayout; persists last-used sub-view.

nodes.name: Sub-View Switch Transition
nodes.description: User-triggered switch between graph and details (or graph and list) sub-views within a section; fires when the user clicks a sub-tab; updates the :view route parameter.

nodes.name: Layer Deep-Link Transition
nodes.description: Programmatic navigation to a specific layer in the model graph by setting the ?layer= search parameter; triggered by cross-layer panel element clicks and breadcrumb navigation.

nodes.name: Auth Redirect Transition
nodes.description: Programmatic redirect from the index route to the model graph view after successful token extraction; triggered by the AuthRoute on token validation success.

nodes.name: Authentication to Model Flow
nodes.description: Two-step navigation flow for first-time access: step 1 lands on the index route to extract the magic link token; step 2 navigates programmatically to the model graph view after token validation.

nodes.name: WebSocket Disconnect Alert
nodes.description: Warning alert triggered when the DR CLI WebSocket connection drops and falls back to REST-only polling mode; indicates the real-time model update channel is unavailable.

nodes.name: Storybook Story Render Error Alert
nodes.description: Warning alert triggered when a Storybook story renders with console errors not in the approved filter list; detected by the test-runner storyErrorFilters.ts during CI story validation.

attributes.condition: story console error not in storyErrorFilters allowlist

nodes.name: Playwright Test Failure Alert
nodes.description: Critical alert triggered when any Playwright test suite exits with failures; covers unit, integration, E2E, and auth test configs; indicates regression in core functionality.

attributes.condition: playwright test exit code not equals 0

nodes.name: Error Tracker Instrumentation Scope
nodes.description: Named instrumentation scope for the errorTracker and exceptionClassifier services; groups all error/exception signals produced by the frontend error handling subsystem.

nodes.name: Browser Error Instrumentation
nodes.description: Manual browser error instrumentation configuration for the embedded viewer; the errorTracker service captures runtime exceptions, classifies them by category (network, rendering, data, auth), and logs structured error records.

nodes.name: Browser Console Error Log Configuration
nodes.description: Log configuration for browser console error capture; the errorTracker service writes structured error records with classification category, stack trace, and context; minimum severity ERROR.

nodes.name: Embedded App Resource
nodes.description: OpenTelemetry-style resource identity for the browser-based embedded architecture viewer; identifies the frontend service unit producing all observability signals.

nodes.name: WebSocket Connection State Gauge
nodes.description: Gauge instrument tracking the current DR CLI WebSocket connection state (1=connected, 0=disconnected); sourced from connectionStore connection status transitions; enables alerting on connection loss.

nodes.name: WebSocket Reconnection Attempt Counter
nodes.description: Counter tracking cumulative WebSocket reconnection attempts; incremented by the websocketClient reconnect loop; measures connection stability over a session.

nodes.name: Chat API Token Usage Counter
nodes.description: Counter accumulating Anthropic API token consumption (input + output tokens) across chat messages in a session; displayed in the UsageStatsBadge component with cost in USD.

nodes.name: Graph Node Render Histogram
nodes.description: Histogram tracking React Flow node render counts per graph view; useful for detecting layout performance degradation as model size grows.

nodes.name: Service and Store Unit Test Coverage
nodes.description: Coverage target for unit testing of all core services (dataLoader, nodeTransformer, yamlParser, crossLayerProcessor, etc.) and Zustand stores; ~40 spec files under tests/unit/; 1170 total tests via playwright.config.ts.

nodes.name: Cross-Component Integration Test Coverage
nodes.description: Coverage target for integration tests verifying cross-component data flows: node transformer pipeline, cross-layer worker integration, libavoid routing, chat service, and preference persistence; 7 files under tests/integration/.

nodes.name: Embedded App E2E Test Coverage
nodes.description: Coverage target for E2E tests of the full embedded application: app rendering, auth flow, graph rendering, dual-view, websocket recovery, zoom-to-layer, and sidebar consolidation; run via playwright.e2e.config.ts with a live DR CLI server.

nodes.name: Auth Flow E2E Test Coverage
nodes.description: Coverage target for bearer token authentication tests including race conditions, magic link token extraction, and localStorage persistence; dedicated playwright.auth.config.ts; covers embedded-auth-race-condition.spec.ts.

nodes.name: Storybook Story Render Test Coverage
nodes.description: Coverage target for Storybook component story validation; 578 stories across 97 story files tested via test-storybook runner; validates all node types, layout engines, panels, graph views, and chat components render without errors.

nodes.name: WCAG 2.1 Accessibility Test Coverage
nodes.description: Coverage target for WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility compliance; axe-core automated tests via @axe-core/playwright run against all Storybook stories; dedicated tests/stories/accessibility.spec.ts; covers all interactive components.

nodes.name: WebSocket Recovery Test Coverage
nodes.description: Coverage target for WebSocket connection failure, reconnection, and REST fallback mode scenarios; tests/websocket-recovery.spec.ts; ensures graceful degradation when DR CLI server is unavailable.

nodes.name: Functional Unit Test Context
nodes.description: Standard functional test context for unit and integration tests; runs in Playwright's browser environment (Chromium) against mock data via MSW; fastest feedback loop.

nodes.name: Regression E2E Test Context
nodes.description: Regression test context for full E2E and auth tests; runs against a live Vite dev server and DR CLI server; catches integration regressions between the viewer and the CLI server API.

nodes.name: Smoke Story Test Context
nodes.description: Smoke test context for Storybook story validation; runs test-storybook against the built or dev Storybook server on port 61001; quick visual regression smoke check.

nodes.name: Code Line Coverage Gap
nodes.description: No code line/branch coverage instrumentation (Istanbul/c8/V8) is configured; test pass/fail is tracked but percentage line coverage is unknown; impacts confidence in dead-code identification.

nodes.name: Load Test Coverage Gap
nodes.description: No load or performance tests exist for graph rendering with large models (100+ nodes); layout engine performance under stress is untested; risk area given 4 layout engines with different complexity profiles.

nodes.name: Each-Choice Story Coverage Requirement
nodes.description: Requirement that every Storybook story renders at least once without console errors; each-choice criteria ensures no component story is skipped; enforced by the Storybook test runner on all 578 stories.

nodes.name: All-Partitions Unit Test Requirement
nodes.description: Requirement that all public service methods and store actions have at least one test covering each logical partition; all-partitions criteria applied to dataLoader, nodeTransformer, crossLayerProcessor, and all store methods.

nodes.name: Boundary Values Auth Test Requirement
nodes.description: Requirement that token extraction tests exercise boundary cases: valid token, missing token, malformed token, expired token, and race condition between multiple rapid navigations.

nodes.name: Viewer Test Coverage Model
nodes.description: Root IEEE 829-style test coverage model for the documentation_robotics_viewer application; spans unit, integration, E2E, Storybook story, and accessibility test types run via Playwright.

nodes.name: Overall Test Coverage Summary
nodes.description: Aggregate coverage status across the full test suite: 8 coverage targets, 3 coverage requirements. Total Playwright tests: 1170. Storybook stories: 578. Automated coverage: 100% of unit and integration targets. Missing: code line coverage metrics (no Istanbul/c8 configured).
